name: Satkar Grewal
Information: I’m a results-driven entrepreneur with a passion for building scalable businesses. With a strong foundation in operations and a deep understanding of market dynamics, I founded Logipod to create seamless logistics solutions that empower businesses to thrive. My focus is on leveraging technology and innovation to simplify complex supply chain challenges and deliver measurable value to our clients.
